question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/evm/config/EvmConfiguration.java -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: cacheManagerEntity()] Can an unprivileged external user send eth_call requests that resolve EVM addresses (CACHE_NAME_EVM_ADDRESS) for 10,000 distinct addresses (maximumSize=10000), filling the entity cache to capacity, then send requests for new addresses to force cache eviction and DB lookups for entity resolution, causing a 30%+ increase in DB query rate and memory churn?
